message:
fix(scheduler,combinator): work-stealing guard, cancel-lane unpark, and clippy lints

Three targeted fixes across the scheduler and combinator subsystems:

1. priority.rs — steal_ready_batch_into: add early return when
   max_steal==0 or ready lane is empty, preventing division-by-zero
   in the steal_count calculation and avoiding unnecessary work. Adds
   test steal_ready_batch_into_respects_zero_max verifying zero max
   returns zero stolen and leaves all tasks in place.

2. three_lane.rs — move_to_cancel_lane: remove the task from the
   local ready queue before moving it to the cancel lane (prevents
   double-polling), and unpark the worker thread so the cancel lane
   is drained promptly instead of waiting for the next poll cycle.

3. retry.rs — clamp_nanos_f64: suppress clippy::cast_precision_loss
   and clippy::cast_sign_loss warnings with explicit allow attributes
   since the function already handles NaN/negative/overflow cases
   before the cast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
